compiled_state.title: Control flow not returned to sprint orchestrator after /dso:implementation-plan skill completion
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## What happened

When /dso:sprint invokes /dso:implementation-plan via the Skill tool, the implementation-plan skill completes successfully (emits STATUS:complete line) but control does not return to the sprint orchestrator. The orchestrator stalls waiting for the skill result instead of continuing to process the next layer or proceeding to Phase 2 task classification.

## Expected behavior

After /dso:implementation-plan emits its STATUS:complete line, the Skill tool should return the result to the calling sprint orchestrator, which then continues with the next step (e.g., processing Layer 1 stories or proceeding to task classification).

## Observed behavior

The sprint orchestrator appears to lose control flow after the Skill tool invocation of /dso:implementation-plan. The user had to manually prompt to continue.

## Likely root cause

This is a known pattern with nested Skill tool invocations — the implementation-plan skill's STATUS line and termination directive may not be surfacing correctly back through the Skill tool to the calling context. Similar to the control flow regression noted in SKILL.md Step 10 (CONTROL FLOW WARNING for /dso:commit).

## Reproduction

1. Run /dso:sprint on an epic with stories that need implementation planning
2. Sprint orchestrator invokes /dso:implementation-plan via Skill tool for a story
3. Implementation plan completes and emits STATUS:complete
4. Observe: orchestrator does not continue automatically

## Severity

P2 — workaround is manual "continue" prompt, but it breaks the autonomous sprint flow.

comments.body: Classification: behavioral. Fix complexity: COMPLEX — requires sprint SKILL.md to read implementation-plan/SKILL.md inline instead of using Skill tool, similar to COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md pattern. Affects multiple invocation sites (lines 237, 254, 338, 345). Escalating to epic.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: COMPLEX_ESCALATION: Bug requires modifying sprint/SKILL.md at 4+ invocation sites to read implementation-plan inline instead of using Skill tool. This is a cross-system refactor affecting the sprint orchestrator's core dispatch mechanism. Deferring to user for epic creation via /dso:brainstorm.
comments.author: Test
